meaning: n.博士,医生;Distributed Refresh,分布式刷新
examples: He's one of Dr Shaw's patients.
He's under the care of Dr Parks.
Dr. Aubin is a native of St. Louis.
Dr Peter Richardson, of the Marine Conservation Society (MCS), said Wales' waters were currently "turtle heaven".
Dr Choudri has coeliac disease himself and knows the importance of a gluten-free diet.
